schema_diagram.description: Entity-Relationship diagram showing database schema and relationships
schema_diagram.content:
erDiagram
    MEMBER ||--o{ ATTENDANCE : "has"
    EVENT ||--o{ ATTENDANCE : "has"
    MEMBER ||--o{ EXPENSE : "has"
    BUDGET ||--o{ EXPENSE : "has"
    EVENT ||--o{ BUDGET : "has"
    MEMBER ||--o{ INCOME : "has"
    ZIP_CODE ||--o{ MEMBER : "has"
    MAJOR ||--o{ MEMBER : "has"

    EXPENSE {
        text expense_id PK
        text expense_description
        text expense_date
        float cost
        text approved
        text link_to_member FK
        text link_to_budget FK
    }
    EVENT {
        text event_id PK
        text event_name
        text event_date
        text type
        text notes
        text location
        text status
    }
    BUDGET {
        text budget_id PK
        text category
        float spent
        float remaining
        int amount
        text event_status
        text link_to_event FK
    }
    INCOME {
        text income_id PK
        text date_received
        int amount
        text source
        text notes
        text link_to_member FK
    }
    MEMBER {
        text member_id PK
        text first_name
        text last_name
        text email
        text position
        text t_shirt_size
        text phone
        int zip FK
        text link_to_major FK
    }
    ZIP_CODE {
        int zip_code PK
        text type
        text city
        text county
        text state
        text short_state
    }
    MAJOR {
        text major_id PK
        text major_name
        text department
        text college
    }
    ATTENDANCE {
        text link_to_event PK,FK
        text link_to_member PK,FK
    }

attendance.name: attendance
attendance.description: The attendance table records employee or student presence, capturing who attended and when.

budget.name: budget
budget.description: The budget table tracks allocated and spent amounts across various expense categories—primarily Food, Advertisement, Speaker Gifts, Parking, and Club T-Shirts—for event or organizational planning purposes.

category_values.content: Food=22(42%), Advertisement=15(29%), Speaker Gifts=7(13%), Parking=7(13%), Club T-Shirts=1(2%)

event.name: event
event.description: The event table tracks organizational events, including their type (e.g., Meeting, Guest Speaker) and approval status (e.g., Approved, Pending, Cancelled).

top_values.value: Members and alumni can attend a community theater play at a reduced price. Active membership required.
Attend school football game as a group.
All active members can vote for new officers between 4pm-8pm.
Volunteer opportunity to sort donations for distribution.
Volunteer opportunity to remove graffiti in town.
Volunteer opportunity to pack backpacks for underprivileged youth.
Volunteer opportunity to help paint new home.
Students can stop by the table to get information on the club and register.
Attend school teams baseball game as a group.
Attend school teams Lacrosse game as a group.
Attend school Woman's Lacrosse game as a group.
Attend Women's soccer game as a group.

type_values.content: Meeting=16(38%), Guest Speaker=7(17%), Game=6(14%), Social=4(10%), Community Service=4(10%), Election=2(5%), Budget=2(5%), Registration=1(2%)

expense.name: expense
expense.description: The expense table tracks employee-related expenditures, primarily linked to members M001, M002, and M003, with nearly all entries approved.

quality_issues.description: TEXT field storing numeric values (100% numeric, 32/32 non-empty)

income.name: income
income.description: This table tracks income sources for an organization, primarily membership dues, with optional links to individual members via Airtable-style record IDs.

top_values.value: Secured donations to help pay for speaker gifts.
Ad revenue for use on flyers used to advertise upcoming events.

link_to_member_meaning.content: Airtable-style record ID linking this income entry to a specific member; null indicates no associated member.

source_meaning.content: Category indicating the origin of the income: Dues (membership fees), Sponsorship, School Appropration (likely Appropriation), or Fundraising.

quality_issues.description: TEXT field storing numeric values (100% numeric, 36/36 non-empty)

major.name: major
major.description: The major table stores information about academic majors, including their distribution across colleges, to support enrollment analysis and institutional planning.

top_values.value: College of Agriculture and Applied Sciences
College of Humanities and Social Sciences

college_values.content: College of Agriculture and Applied Sciences(31.9%), College of Humanities and Social Sciences(21.2%), College of Education & Human Services(11.5%), College of Science(10.6%), College of Natural Resources(8.0%), School of Business(6.2%), College of the Arts(5.3%), College of Engineering(5.3%)

member.name: member
member.description: The member table stores information about organization members, including their roles (primarily general members with a few executive positions) and T-shirt sizes for event or uniform purposes.

position_values.content: Member=26(78.8%), Inactive=3(9.1%), Vice President=1(3.0%), Treasurer=1(3.0%), Secretary=1(3.0%), President=1(3.0%)

quality_issues.description: TEXT field storing numeric values (94% numeric, 31/33 non-empty)

zip_code.name: zip_code
zip_code.description: The zip_code table stores geographic and demographic information associated with U.S. ZIP codes to support location-based data analysis and address validation.
